caption: The video captures a scene from a soccer stadium, likely during a pre-game or halftime moment. The stands are sparsely populated with players and staff, all wearing masks, indicating adherence to health protocols. Players in red and blue jerseys are seen sitting and standing on the red seats, engaging in various activities such as stretching, talking, and preparing for the game. A goalkeeper in a blue jersey is also visible, holding gloves and walking through the area. The atmosphere appears calm and focused, with some individuals clapping and others observing their surroundings. The banners and advertisements in the background suggest a professional setting, adding to the anticipation of the upcoming match.
